title: [MTS/IV] Universal License Plates (ULP)
description: Adds even more personality to that old 650 sitting in your driveway.
body:
NOTE: I used free to use license plate templates from Immersive Vehicles Vanity

Welcome to Universal License Plates. A MTS pack that adds personality to your vehicle.

A variety of plates are provided which include plates from the US, Europe and other regions across the globe.

The Immersive Vehicles mod is required for this mod to work:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-transport-simulator

If you have any suggestions or questions regarding the pack, join the discord server:
https://discord.gg/ekwZQDQfsT
